nasb.text: Shimei then said to the king, “The word is good. As my lord the king has said, so your servant will do.” So Shimei lived in Jerusalem many days.

esv.text: And Shimei said to the king, “What you say is good; as my lord the king has said, so will your servant do.” So Shimei lived in Jerusalem many days.

cnv.text: 示每對王說：“這話很好，我主我王怎麼說，你僕人就照著行。”於是示每在耶路撒冷住了很久。

ccb.text: 示每说：“好，仆人必照我主我王说的做。”示每就一直住在耶路撒冷。
